basis.description: observed = projected from recent drain durations; none = insufficient data, no fabricated ETA

etaMs.description: projected ms until the backlog clears at the current drain rate (0 = already caught up)

drainRateChunksPerSec.description: the observed drain rate the projection used

measuredTokPerSec.description: the active llm endpoint's MEASURED tok/s (envelope §8) — context, not the ETA basis in v0
